'''shopahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eyecatching|eyecatching]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-p-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eyecatching|eyecatching]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shopahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shopahithi|shopahithi]] || [[word:shopahiji|shopahiji]] || [[word:shopahishi|shopahishi]] || [[word:shopahiki|shopahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shopahuthuthu|shopahuthuthu]] || [[word:shopahujuju|shopahujuju]] || [[word:shopahushushu|shopahushushu]] || [[word:shopahukuku|shopahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shopahuthu|shopahuthu]] || [[word:shopahuju|shopahuju]] || [[word:shopahushu|shopahushu]] || [[word:shopahuku|shopahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shopahufthuf|shopahufthuf]] || [[word:shopahufjuf|shopahufjuf]] || [[word:shopahufshuf|shopahufshuf]] || [[word:shopahufkuf|shopahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shopahethe|shopahethe]] || [[word:shopaheje|shopaheje]] || [[word:shopaheshe|shopaheshe]] || [[word:shopaheke|shopaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shopahothotho|shopahothotho]] || [[word:shopahojojo|shopahojojo]] || [[word:shopahoshosho|shopahoshosho]] || [[word:shopahokoko|shopahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shopahotho|shopahotho]] || [[word:shopahojo|shopahojo]] || [[word:shopahosho|shopahosho]] || [[word:shopahoko|shopahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shopahofthof|shopahofthof]] || [[word:shopahofjof|shopahofjof]] || [[word:shopahofshof|shopahofshof]] || [[word:shopahofkof|shopahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shopahïfthïf|shopahïfthïf]] || [[word:shopahïfjïf|shopahïfjïf]] || [[word:shopahïfshïf|shopahïfshïf]] || [[word:shopahïfkïf|shopahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shopahïfthïfthïf|shopahïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:shopahïfjïfjïf|shopahïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:shopahïfshïfshïf|shopahïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:shopahïfkïfkïf|shopahïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shopahïfthïf|shopahïfthïf]] || [[word:shopahïfjïf|shopahïfjïf]] || [[word:shopahïfshïf|shopahïfshïf]] || [[word:shopahïfkïf|shopahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shopahïfthïf|shopahïfthïf]] || [[word:shopahïfjïf|shopahïfjïf]] || [[word:shopahïfshïf|shopahïfshïf]] || [[word:shopahïfkïf|shopahïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shopahæthæ|shopahæthæ]] || [[word:shopahæjæ|shopahæjæ]] || [[word:shopahæshæ|shopahæshæ]] || [[word:shopahækæ|shopahækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shopahathatha|shopahathatha]] || [[word:shopahajaja|shopahajaja]] || [[word:shopahashasha|shopahashasha]] || [[word:shopahakaka|shopahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shopahatha|shopahatha]] || [[word:shopahaja|shopahaja]] || [[word:shopahasha|shopahasha]] || [[word:shopahaka|shopahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shopahafthaf|shopahafthaf]] || [[word:shopahafjaf|shopahafjaf]] || [[word:shopahafshaf|shopahafshaf]] || [[word:shopahafkaf|shopahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shopahasha|shopahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shopahshësha|shopahshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shopahrosha|shopahrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shopahmusha|shopahmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shopahyasha|shopahyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshopahnkshësha|goshopahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshopahnkrosha|goshopahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshopahnkmusha|goshopahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshopahnkyasha|goshopahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shopapahasha|shopapahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shopapahshësha|shopapahshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shopapahrosha|shopapahrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shopapahmusha|shopapahmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shopapahyasha|shopapahyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshopapahnkshësha|goshopapahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshopapahnkrosha|goshopapahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshopapahnkmusha|goshopapahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshopapahnkyasha|goshopapahnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shepæhasha|shepæhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shepæhshësha|shepæhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shepæhrosha|shepæhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shepæhmusha|shepæhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shepæhyasha|shepæhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshepæhnkshësha|goshepæhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshepæhnkrosha|goshepæhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshepæhnkmusha|goshepæhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshepæhnkyasha|goshepæhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shopfahasha|shopfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shopfahshësha|shopfahshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shopfahrosha|shopfahrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shopfahmusha|shopfahmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shopfahyasha|shopfahyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshopfahnkshësha|goshopfahnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshopfahnkrosha|goshopfahnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshopfahnkmusha|goshopfahnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshopfahnkyasha|goshopfahnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
